title: TakeS ANiMAL SHAPE
summary: A shapechanger who can take the form of various animals.
tiers: Tier 3: Bigger Animal Shape or Greater Beast Form (works with Animal Shape)
Tier 6: Blurring Speed or Lend Animal Shape
Tier 3: Cypher Surge or Faster Wild Magic
Tier 6: Maximize Cypher or Wild Insight
Tier 3: Tree Companion or Wilderness Awareness
Tier 3: Rapid Attack or Throw Enchanted Weapon
Tier 6: Deadly Strike or Spin Attack
gm_intrusions: A weapon breaks or isdropped. The weapon loses its connectionto you until you use an action toreestablish the attunement. The weapon’senergy discharges in an unexpected way
text: A shapechanger who can take the form of various animals. USES WILD MAGIC spellcaster who learns a variety of spells instead of focusing on just one kind of magic. WALKS THE WILD WOODS An adherent of nature magic who draws on the power and strength of trees. WEILDS AN ENCHANTED WEAPON One who channels magic through or from a weapon to create a unique fighting style.
details: A shapechanger who can take the form of various animals.
spellcaster who learns a variety of spells instead of focusing on just one kind of magic.
An adherent of nature magic who draws on the power and strength of trees.
One who channels magic through or from a weapon to create a unique fighting style.
